c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
fortran_compiler:
- gfortran
fortran_compiler_version:
- '14'
numpy:
- '2'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - fortran_compiler_version

about.summary: Provides an object-oriented python interface to the NCAR SPHEREPACK library

Provides an object-oriented python interface to the NCAR SPHEREPACK library

name: pyspharm

about.summary: Provides an object-oriented python interface to the NCAR SPHEREPACK library
Provides an object-oriented python interface to the NCAR SPHEREPACK library

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "1.0.9"
  commit: 317247960efa47d389cfbdae8ae659252f06731d

package:
  name: pyspharm
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/jswhit/pyspharm/archive/${{ commit }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e579c8d72f09a3f9c6c797f67097f028793b3d37eb84dcca17f1a2655da76f3a

build:
  number: 1016
  skip: win
  script:
    # Cross-compilation stuff vendored from numpy-feedstock
    # necessary for cross-compilation to point to the right env
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - export PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$PREFIX/lib/pkgconfig
        - echo "python = '${PREFIX}/bin/python'" >> ${CONDA_PREFIX}/meson_cross_file.txt
    - if: unix
      then:
        - MESON_ARGS_REDUCED="$(echo $MESON_ARGS | sed 's/--buildtype release //g')"
        - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install -vv --no-deps --ignore-installed . -Csetup-args=${MESON_ARGS_REDUCED// / -Csetup-args=}
      else:
        - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install -vv --no-deps --ignore-installed .

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - numpy
        - meson-python
        - ninja
    - if: win
      then: ${{ compiler('m2w64_fortran') }}
      else: ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
    - if: win
      then:
        - ${{ compiler('m2w64_c') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('m2w64_c') }}
      else:
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - numpy
    - meson-python
  run:
    - python
    - ${{ pin_compatible('numpy') }}

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - spharm
      pip_check: true
  - files:
      source:
        - tests
    requirements:
      run:
        - python
        - numpy
        - pytest
        - hypothesis
    script:
      - pytest tests

about:
  license: LicenseRef-spherepack
  license_file: LICENSE.spherepack
  summary: Provides an object-oriented python interface to the NCAR SPHEREPACK library
  homepage: https://github.com/jswhit/pyspharm

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - ajdawson
    - ocefpaf
    - xylar
